records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that why you murdered Mrs. Anna MacCready? For this exact reason?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haben Sie deshalb Frau Anna MacCready ermordet? Aus genau diesem Grund?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Est-ce pour cela que vous avez assassin959 Mme Anna MacCready ? Parce qu'elle refusait d'arr95xter ?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Enough! Mother was already dead when I arrived!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Das reicht jetzt! Meine Mutter war bereits tot, als ich hier ankam!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Silence ! Qu'insinuez-vous ? M958re 959tait d959j95p morte 95p mon retour !

records.m_Talk_ENG: But she was alive... in a sense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aber sie war noch am Leben. In gewissem Sinne.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Et pourtant en un sens... elle 959tait vivante.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you try talking to her? Persuading her?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Avez-vous essay959 de lui parler ? De la convaincre ?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is your version of the "truth" murdering your own flesh and blood to obtain the Society, Vice President?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or are you behaving this way because of your personal feelings towards the late Anna MacCready?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a rumor that the inflexible Dean of Biology had quite an intimate relationship with her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmph. If you have the time to listen to rumors, why not devote it to Valentinus's ambitious goal?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or do you also wish to hang yourself from the bell towers like that misguided former abbot?
